press_kit_subtitle: Official assets and brand guidelines for OneForMind.
press_kit_bio_desc: OneForMind is a unified productivity ecosystem that bridges the gap between habits, finances, and execution. By leveraging Neural OS (AI-driven insights), we help users identify cognitive friction and optimize their daily flow for long-term clarity.
press_kit_logo_desc: Please use these official logos to ensure the brand consistency of OneForMind.
press_kit_mockups_desc: Visual representations of the OneForMind interface in various contexts.
press_kit_colors_desc: The primary palette that defines the OneForMind aesthetic.
press_kit_contact_desc: For interviews, press questions, or partnership opportunities, contact us at press@oneformind.com
press_kit_foundation_desc: Founded in 2024, OneForMind was born from the need to unify fragmented productivity tools into a single, cohesive human operating system.
